id.description: Unique identifier for this composition within the project.

fps.description: Frames per second this composition runs at.

height.description: Output height of this composition, in pixels.

durationInFrames.description: How many frames this clip is visible for.

node.description: The root of the scene-node subtree this clip contributes.

transitionIn.description: Optional transition this clip blends in with. Omitted means an instant cut.

type.description: Which kind of transition this is. 'cut' is the absence of a transition.

durationInFrames.description: How many frames the transition takes to complete, once the incoming clip starts.

direction.description: Which edge a 'wipe' sweeps in from. Only meaningful (and only allowed) for type: 'wipe'.

clips.description: The ordered clips placed on this track.

tracks.description: The tracks of clips that populate this composition.

activeCameraTrack.description: Optional lane naming which camera is active at each frame, independent of tracks.

durationInFrames.description: How many frames this entry's camera stays active for.

cameraNodeId.description: Id of the CameraNode active for this window, resolved elsewhere in the scene graph.

audioTracks.description: Optional lanes of audio content, independent of tracks.

id.description: Unique identifier for this track within the project.

name.description: Optional human-readable label, purely for authoring and debugging.

id.description: Unique identifier for this clip within the project.

startFrame.description: The frame, relative to the start of its composition, this clip begins on.

durationInFrames.description: How many frames this clip plays for.

assetRef.description: Identifies the source audio asset this clip plays.

trimStartFrames.description: How many frames into the source audio playback begins. Defaults to 0.

gain.description: Linear gain multiplier applied to the source audio. Defaults to 1.

fadeIn.description: Optional ramp from silence up to gain at the start of this clip's window.

durationInFrames.description: How many frames this fade ramp takes to complete.

fadeOut.description: Optional ramp from gain down to silence at the end of this clip's window.

durationInFrames.description: How many frames this fade ramp takes to complete.

clips.description: The ordered audio clips placed on this track.

colorGrading.description: Optional whole-composition color grade (exposure and white balance).

exposureStops.description: Photographic stops of exposure adjustment. Defaults to 0 (no adjustment).

whiteBalanceTemperatureK.description: Assumed scene illuminant color temperature, in Kelvin. Defaults to 6500.

whiteBalanceTint.description: Green-magenta fine adjustment, roughly -1 to 1. Defaults to 0 (no tint).

envMapRef.description: Id of a registered equirectangular environment map, resolved against an environment registry.

rotation.description: Rotation around the vertical (world Y) axis, in radians. Defaults to 0.

intensity.description: Multiplies the environment's own contribution to diffuse and specular image-based lighting. Defaults to 1.

showBackground.description: Whether the environment map is also visible as the rendered background. Defaults to false.

backgroundIntensity.description: Multiplies the displayed background's own brightness. Only meaningful when showBackground is true. Defaults to 1.

groundProjection.description: Optional grounded-skybox projection for grounded product-style shots. Omitted means a standard infinite-sphere environment.

height.description: How far above the ground the environment's own source photo was captured from, in scene units; must be strictly positive. The projected ground plane itself always ends up at world Y 0.

radius.description: Radius of the virtual sky sphere; should comfortably contain the whole scene. Defaults to 100.

shadowQuality.description: Optional whole-composition shadow and ambient-occlusion tuning.

tier.description: Trades render cost against fidelity. Defaults to 'final'.

cascadedShadows.description: Optional cascaded shadow maps for directional lights. WebGPU-backend only; see its own doc.

cascades.description: Number of shadow cascades. Defaults to 3 (4 at the 'final' quality tier).

maxFar.description: The far distance cascades extend to, in scene units. Defaults to 100000.

radius.description: How far, in scene units, occlusion sampling reaches when looking for nearby occluders. Defaults to 1.

intensity.description: Multiplies the occlusion's own darkening strength. Defaults to 1.

contactShadows.description: Optional soft contact-shadow decals for grounded product-style shots.

groundY.description: Height of the ground plane contact shadows are projected onto, in scene units.

opacity.description: Opacity of the contact shadow at its darkest point, 0 to 1. Defaults to 0.5.

radius.description: Radius of the soft contact-shadow decal, in scene units. Defaults to 2.

tier.description: Trades render cost against fidelity. Defaults to 'final'.

amount.description: Strength of the sharpening effect. 0 is a no-op. Defaults to 0.5.

threshold.description: Luminance level above which a pixel starts contributing to the glow, in linear scene-referred HDR. Defaults to 0.85.

intensity.description: Multiplies the glow's own brightness once added back over the scene. Defaults to 1.

radius.description: How far the glow spreads from a bright pixel, roughly in screen-relative units. Defaults to 0.4.

focusDistance.description: Distance from the camera, in scene units, that stays in sharp focus. Defaults to 10.

aperture.description: How wide the lens opening is: larger values blur out-of-focus regions more strongly. Defaults to 0.025.

maxBlur.description: Caps how far the blur can spread, independent of aperture. Defaults to 1.

intensity.description: Strength of the channel shift. 0 is a no-op. Defaults to 0.5.

darkness.description: How dark the corners get, 0 (no darkening) to 1 (fully black). Defaults to 1.

offset.description: How far the darkening reaches in from the corners toward the center; larger values reach further. Defaults to 1.

intensity.description: Strength of the noise. 0 is a no-op. Defaults to 0.35.

amount.description: Distortion strength: positive bulges outward (barrel), negative pinches inward (pincushion), 0 is a no-op. Defaults to 0.

shutterAngle.description: Shutter angle in degrees, 0 to 360. Defaults to 180.

samples.description: Samples taken along each pixel's own velocity vector. Higher is smoother and more expensive. Defaults to 16.

lightNodeId.description: Id of the LightNode light shafts are cast from.

raymarchSteps.description: Raymarch steps sampled along each pixel's own view ray. Higher is smoother and more expensive. Defaults to 60.

maxDensity.description: Caps how dense (opaque) the accumulated rays can become. Defaults to 0.5.

distanceAttenuation.description: How strongly rays fade with distance from the light. Defaults to 2.

lift.description: Shadow offset per channel, raising or lowering black level. [0, 0, 0] is a no-op.

gamma.description: Midtone power per channel. [1, 1, 1] is a no-op.

gain.description: Highlight multiplier per channel. [1, 1, 1] is a no-op.

saturation.description: Overall color intensity: 0 is grayscale, 1 is a no-op, above 1 oversaturates. Defaults to 1.

contrast.description: Contrast around the mid-gray pivot: 1 is a no-op. Defaults to 1.

lutRef.description: Id of a registered 3D LUT, resolved against a LUT registry.

intensity.description: Blends between the un-graded image (0) and the full LUT result (1). Defaults to 1.

effects.description: The effect stack, applied in array order within each effect's own fixed pre/post-tonemap stage. An empty array is a no-op.

sampleCount.description: Sub-pixel-jittered camera samples accumulated into each output frame, rounded up to the nearest power of two, one to 32. Omitted or 1 means no accumulation.

renderMode.description: Optional render mode override. Defaults to 'raster'.

pathTracing.description: Optional path-traced render tuning, read only when renderMode is 'pathTraced'.

tier.description: Trades render cost against fidelity for samples's own default. Defaults to 'final'.

samples.description: Samples accumulated per output frame. Higher is cleaner and slower. Tier-dependent default when omitted.

bounces.description: Maximum light bounce depth. Higher resolves more indirect light and reflections at a higher cost. Defaults to 5.

denoise.description: Applies edge-aware denoising to the accumulated result once sampling finishes, trading a small amount of fine detail for a dramatically cleaner image at the same sample budget. Defaults to false.

gravity.description: Acceleration applied to every dynamic rigid body. Defaults to [0, -9.81, 0].

substeps.description: Physics sub-steps per rendered frame, trading cost for stability. Defaults to 1.

physicsConstraints.description: Optional joints constraining pairs of this composition's own rigid bodies.

bodyA.description: Id of the MeshNode (with a rigidBody set) this constraint's first body attaches to.

bodyB.description: Id of the MeshNode (with a rigidBody set) this constraint's second body attaches to.

mapSize.description: Shadow map resolution (both width and height), in pixels; must be a power of two. Defaults to 512.

bias.description: Shadow map depth bias; small adjustments (around 0.0001) can reduce shadow acne. Defaults to 0.

radius.description: Softens the shadow's own edge by blurring the shadow map. Defaults to 1.

distance.description: For 'point'/'spot' lights: maximum range of the light, in scene units. 0 (Three.js's own default) means no distance cutoff.

decay.description: For 'point'/'spot' lights: how much the light dims over distance. 2 (Three.js's own default) is physically correct inverse-square falloff.

angle.description: For 'spot' lights only: the light cone's maximum angle from its own direction, in radians, up to Math.PI / 2. Defaults to Three.js's own Math.PI / 3.

penumbra.description: For 'spot' lights only: how much the cone's edge is softened, from 0 to 1. Defaults to 0.

width.description: For 'area' lights only: the rectangle's width, in scene units. Defaults to 10.

height.description: For 'area' lights only: the rectangle's height, in scene units. Defaults to 10.

stagger.description: A deterministic per-unit staggered reveal animation across this node's own content. Omitted means no staggering.

grouping.description: Which unit a TextStaggerConfig splits the node's own content into.

startFrame.description: The frame the very first unit (in stagger order) begins revealing at.

delayFrames.description: Frames between each consecutive unit's own reveal start, in stagger order.

durationFrames.description: How many frames one unit's own reveal takes, once it starts. Ignored by "wave".

easing.description: Defaults to "linear".

distance.description: "fadeInUp" only: how far below its natural position a unit starts, in fontSize-relative em units. Defaults to 0.5.

amplitude.description: "wave" only: peak vertical offset, in fontSize-relative em units. Defaults to 0.1.

periodFrames.description: "wave" only: frames per full oscillation. Defaults to 30.

physics.description: Expressive per-glyph animation (springs, jitter, wave, scramble, count-up), composable with stagger. Omitted means no physics effect.

effect.description: Which per-glyph animation a TextPhysicsConfig drives.

grouping.description: Which unit a TextStaggerConfig splits the node's own content into.

seed.description: Seeds this effect's own deterministic randomness ("jitter"'s noise, "scramble"'s character choices). Defaults to 0.

startFrame.description: "spring"/"scramble" only: the frame the very first unit (in rank order) begins animating at. Defaults to 0.

delayFrames.description: "spring"/"scramble" only: frames between each consecutive unit's own start, in rank order. Defaults to 0 (every unit starts together).

durationFrames.description: "spring"/"scramble"/"countUp" only: how many frames one unit's own animation takes, once it starts. Defaults to 30.

fps.description: "spring" only: the composition's own frame rate, needed to convert frame counts into physical time for the mass-spring-damper simulation. Defaults to 30.

distance.description: "spring" only: how far (in fontSize-relative em units) a unit starts offset from its natural position. Defaults to 1.

positionAmplitude.description: "jitter"/"wave" only: peak offset, in fontSize-relative em units. Defaults to 0.05 for "jitter", 0.1 for "wave".

rotationAmplitude.description: "jitter" only: peak rotation around the glyph's own local Z axis, in radians. Defaults to 0 (no rotation jitter).

periodFrames.description: "jitter"'s own noise checkpoint spacing, or "wave"'s own oscillation period, in frames. Defaults to 20 for "jitter", 30 for "wave".

charset.description: "scramble" only: which characters a not-yet-locked-in unit is randomly drawn from. Defaults to uppercase Latin letters and digits.

fromValue.description: "countUp" only: the value displayed at frame <= startFrame. Defaults to 0.

toValue.description: "countUp" only: the value displayed at frame >= startFrame + durationFrames. Defaults to 0.

decimalPlaces.description: "countUp" only: fixed decimal places in the formatted number. Defaults to 0.

useGrouping.description: "countUp" only: whether to group digits with a thousands separator (always a fixed en-US-equivalent format regardless of runtime locale). Defaults to false.

easing.description: "countUp" only: eases the count's own progress. Defaults to "linear".

path.description: Places this node's own glyphs along a curve instead of a flat line. Omitted means a normal flat layout.
